title: Girls on the Jeep roof — scanning the forest
prompt: Wide low-angle shot — the black @jeep-wrangler already parked still in @magic-forest-sandy, license plate reading 'SARA AND EVA' visible on the rear bumper. @Sara already SITTING on the Jeep's hood near the windshield on the LEFT side, both hands cupped above her brow like a sea-captain scanning the horizon. @Eva already SITTING on the hood on the RIGHT side next to her sister, mirroring the hand-shielding pose. Towering pine trunks of the forest surround the Jeep. Sara (hand to forehead, looking off to the right): "I see... TREES." Eva (hand to forehead, looking off to the left): "I see... MORE trees." (pause) Sara (suddenly leaning forward): "Wait... SOMETHING is moving in there!" Eva freezes, leans forward too, eyes huge.
